title: Jinbe and Luffy Share Blood
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, King Neptune, Unknown person #6. The central beat is jinbe and luffy share blood.
scene: The scene focuses on jinbe and luffy share blood, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, King Neptune, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ....!! They barely even stood a chance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Look out above!! Everybody run for it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Franky!! Your beam was the awesomest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're making my giant robot look small!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "Was that robot actually good for anything?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: The whole island's gonna be crushed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is it too late for us all?!!

summary: Jinbe and Luffy Share Blood. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
